Canada.fact: CIHR's 'One Health' Antimicrobial Resistance research networks specifically fund virtual modeling and bacterial simulation projects to combat superbugs.
The National Research Council (NRC) Ideation Fund provides collaborative research grants up to CAD $250,000 for breakthrough health technologies and simulation platforms.
The Public Health Agency of Canada (PHAC) allocates dedicated funding for infectious disease simulation modeling under the Infectious Disease Laboratory Network.
